posts.title: Axios Makes Life Easier
posts.body: Using Axios instead of fetch simplifies HTTP requests and improves code readability. Error handling and response parsing become much cleaner compared to native solutions.

posts.title: Why State Management Matters
posts.body: Managing state properly is one of the most important concepts in React. Understanding how data flows between components helps prevent bugs and improves application scalability.

posts.title: Building Realistic Projects
posts.body: Creating projects that mimic real-world scenarios is essential for improving frontend skills. Implementing CRUD with REST APIs provides practical experience valued in job interviews.
